ogTitle: Poruma Island vs Pozieres: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Poruma Island and Pozieres.
heading: Poruma Island vs Pozieres — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Poruma Island, Queensland and Pozieres, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pozieres has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Poruma Island (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Poruma Island or Pozieres safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Poruma Island has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Pozieres scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Poruma Island scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Pozieres scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Poruma Island or Pozieres?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pozieres has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
